zh.lifeSummary: 當Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen於1299年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格時，他的父親Otto von Hessen I27歲，母親Adelheid von Ravensberg29歲。他於1320年9月25日之前與Elisabeth von Meissen在德國格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1376年6月3日在德國賀瑟可萊斯 阿道夫_享年77歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen于1299年出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格时，他的父亲Otto von Hessen I27岁，母亲Adelheid von Ravensberg29岁。他于1320年9月25日之前与Elisabeth von Meissen在德国格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1376年6月3日在德国賀瑟可萊斯 阿道夫_享年77岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hessen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna.  Scandinavian Hjalmer.
German:

habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (German Hessen), a region (present-day federal state) in Germany named with the German dative plural form of the name of its inhabitants, the Hessians. Compare Hess 1.

variants.name: Haessig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Reiner.
German (Hässig):
habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse, from the adjectival form of its German name (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hesser
meanings: German:
nickname for a chaser at a hunt, from an agent derivative of Middle High German hessen ‘to hound’.
habitational name for someone from Hesse (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hess
meanings: German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (see   Hessen   1).
South German: from a short form of the personal name Matthäus (see Matthew ).
German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hesso, a derivative of a compound name formed with hadu ‘strife’ as the first element, or from a pet form of Herman or Hendrik (see Henry 1).

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power’. See Henry .

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Wondrous’ or ‘enlightenment’.
2  ♀ ‘Fine jade’.

en.lifeSummary: When Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen was born in 1299, in Marburg, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, his father, Otto von Hessen I, was 27 and his mother, Adelheid von Ravensberg, was 29. He married Elisabeth von Meissen before 25 September 1320, in Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 3 June 1376, in Kassel, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 77, and was buried in Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany.

fr.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: Eisenach, Kreis Eisenacher, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen est né en 1299, à Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Otto von Hessen I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Ravensberg, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Meissen avant 25 septembre 1320, à Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1376, à Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen 1299 in Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto von Hessen I 27 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Ravensberg 29. Er hat vor 25. September 1320 in Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland Elisabeth von Meissen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juni 1376 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Deutschland und wurde in Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen è nato il nel 1299 nel Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Otto von Hessen I, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Ravensberg, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Meissen prima del 25 settembre 1320, nel Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 giugno 1376, nel Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Germania, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessenが1299年にドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス マルブルグで生まれた時，父Otto von Hessen Iは27歳，母Adelheid von Ravensbergは29歳であった。1320年9月25日以前にドイツグロssハーゾグトゥム サチセン-ウエイマル-エイセナチでElisabeth von Meissenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1376年6月3日にドイツヘセンクレイス カセルで77歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen(이)가 1299년 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto von Hessen I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Ravensberg(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1320년 9월 25일 이전 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h에서 Elisabeth von Meissen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1376년 6월 3일 독일 헤센 크레이스 카셀에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen nasceu em 1299, em Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto von Hessen I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Ravensberg, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Meissen antes 25 de setembro de 1320, em Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1376, em Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Alemanha, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empi: кассел, эрзбистум меинз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: аисенач, крис аисеначир, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen родился в 1299 г. в местности крис марбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Otto von Hessen I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Ravensberg, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Meissen перед 25 сентябрь 1320 г. в местности гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 3 июня 1376 г. в местности крис кассел, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Landgraf Heinrich II von Hessen nació en 1299, en Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Otto von Hessen I, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Ravensberg, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elisabeth von Meissen antes de 25 de septiembre de 1320, en Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de junio de 1376, en Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Alemania, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania.
